title: Demystifying Agent Harnesses
oneLine: What's actually inside an agent harness, how the planner-tools-executor loop runs, and where each design knob lives. Coding agents are the running example; the patterns generalize.
prereqs: You've used an agent of some kind (Claude Code, Cursor, a research agent, a customer-service bot). Comfortable reading shell, Python, and JSON. No prior harness theory needed.
